title: CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER - 211info
text: JULIETTE'S HOUSE CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assessments, support services, medical evaluations, and forensic evaluations for suspected child abuse victims. Also provides on-site and off-site therapy and counseling referrals, safety planning, advocacy services, and community training. 1075 SW Cedarwood Avenue Mcminnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Children ages 0-18 suspected to be victims of all types of abuse and domestic violence or neglect as well as non-offending family members or caregivers Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 435-1550 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 435-1550 Main phone Main phone (503) 435-1550 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Referral by law enforcement, ODHS, CPS, other agencies, health care providers, or individuals FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Polk, Tillamook, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Child Abuse Counseling Child Abuse Medical Evaluations Child Abuse Prevention Child Advocacy Centers Therapy Referrals * Child Abuse Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - SAFE KIDS PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TRAUMA RECOVERY SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JULIETTE'S HOUSE
